name: clawdia7
description: AI-powered desktop workspace with multi-provider chat, embedded browser, terminal, and OS-level tool access.
author: Daniel Parker

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.safe-dev: npm run build && npm run start:stable
scripts.safe-dev:hmr: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron:once"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 dist/main/main.js dist/main/preload.js && nodemon --delay 1 --watch dist/main/main.js --watch dist/main/preload.js --watch dist/main/registerIpc.js --watch dist/main/registerTerminalIpc.js --watch dist/main/ipc-channels.js --watch dist/main/core --watch dist/shared --exec "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron --no-sandbox ."
scripts.dev:electron:once: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 dist/main/main.js dist/main/preload.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron --no-sandbox .
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.obs:stable: npm run build && npm run start:stable
